title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.200 - Phi Mu Alpha Week designated for first week of October
text:
9.200.  Phi Mu Alpha Week designated for first week of October. — The first week of October shall be known as "Phi Mu Alpha Week" in Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate events and activities recognizing the contributions made by members of Phi Mu Alpha in Missouri.
(L. 2022 H.B. 2627 § 1)
